subject: [PATCH v2 04/21] sunrpc: defer rq_argp and rq_resp free until after RCU grace period

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free issue in the sunrpc code by deferring the free of rq_argp and rq_resp until after an RCU grace period, ensuring that RCU readers do not access freed resources. The patch introduces a new callback function svc_rqst_free_rcu to handle the delayed freeing of these resources, while synchronously freeing other resources such as bvec, buffer pages, scratch folio, and auth_data.
